sources.page_title: Gyeon PPF Maintain - 500 ml - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon PPF Maintain - 500 ml

Price: $34.99

Quantity Discounts:
- 2+: $31.99 (9% savings)

Available Sizes: 500 ml

Product Code: GY-1658

Product Information:
- Easy to apply PPF protection product
- Spray and wipe application
- Lasts 4-6 weeks

Product Description:
The Gyeon PPF Maintain provides essential spray on protection against harmful environmental factors for your PPF (Paint Protection Film) surfaces! With an innovative formula, Maintain creates a hydrophobic barrier that repels water, dirt, and other pollutants, effectively reducing the risk of staining or damage to your PPF. This protective layer also enhances the self-cleaning properties of your PPF, making cleaning even easier in the long run. By regularly using the Gyeon PPF Maintain, you can effortlessly maintain a pristine and flawless look. To apply, simply spray the product onto the surface of your PPF, ensuring an even coverage. Using a clean microfiber towel gently wipe away any excess, leaving behind a refreshed and glossy finish. With its user-friendly application, the Gyeon PPF Maintain is perfect for both enthusiasts and professionals alike. Maintain is designed to complement and enhance the longevity of your existing PPF. It works seamlessly with Gyeon's range of PPF products, ensuring a comprehensive and integrated care routine. Whether you have recently installed a PPF or are looking to revitalize an older one, Maintain is your go-to solution for long-lasting protection and stunning visual appeal. Choose the Gyeon PPF Maintain and experience the pinnacle of PPF care and maintenance!

Technical Specifications:
- Suitable for matte PPF: Yes
- PH Tolerance: 4-9
- SIO2 Percentage: >5%
- Contact Angle: >80'
- Consumption: 30ml/car
- Durability: >6 weeks

From The Label:
High-performance PPF sealant & maintenance spray. Suitable for any PPF. Adds depth, slickness and self cleaning.
- Ceramic PPF maintenance
- Self-cleaning properties
- Water repellent

Directions:
Shake well before use. Use only on clean surface. Spray onto a microfiber and wipe a panel at a time till a streak free finish. Do not spray directly on PPF. Wet/dry use possible, also as a stand alone product. Works great as a drying aid.
KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews: No reviews yet.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M PPF Maintain REDEFINED 500ml | Product
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M PPF Maintain REDEFINED 500ml

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 116167
Price: $54.99 AUD

Description:
Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined is a unique, SiO₂-based spray formulated to extend and enhance the self-cleaning properties of any Paint Protection Film (PPF) on the market. It is the ideal maintenance solution for films coated with Q² PPF EVO or any other PPF system.

Product Features and Benefits:
- Slick & Repellent Finish: Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined preserves the incredible slickness of your PPF or vinyl wrap. Its SiO₂ content increases the hydrophobicity of the film, providing added protection against UV rays and oxidation, all while enhancing the original self-cleaning capabilities.
- REDEFINED: As part of GYEON's REDEFINED line, this product offers superior performance, durability, and ease of use, taking PPF maintenance to the next level.

Q²M PPF Maintain will allow you to maintain incredible slickness of your PPF or Vinyl wrap. Being SiO² based, it will also increase the original hydrophobicity of your film while adding more protection against UV rays & future oxidation.

Gyeon Q²M PPF Maintain contains no harsh chemicals or solvents, making it safe for use on all types of paint protection films. This product is easy to use and can be applied by hand or with a foam applicator. Simply apply a small amount of product to the surface of the film, and then wipe it clean with a microfiber towel.

Gyeon Q²M PPF Maintain is an essential product for anyone who has invested in a paint protection film for their vehicle. With regular use, this product will help to maintain the appearance and longevity of your film, ensuring that it continues to provide the protection that you need.

Technical Specifications:
- Suitable for matte PPF: YES
- Consumption: 30ml/car
- Durability: >6 weeks

How to Use:
Step 1: Prepare the Surface - Before using Gyeon Q2M PPF Maintain, make sure the surface is cool to the touch and out of direct sunlight. Rinse the surface with water to remove any loose dirt or debris.
Step 2: Shake the Bottle - Shake the bottle well before use to ensure the product is properly mixed.
Step 3: Spray the Product onto the Surface - Spray Gyeon Q2M PPF Maintain onto the surface, making sure to cover the entire area. Do not let the product dry on the surface.
Step 4: Level Down Towel - Using a microfiber towel, gently wipe off the product, leveling down any high spots. Make sure to use a clean section of the towel for each pass.
Step 5: Wipe Away Excess Product - After wiping off the excess product with a clean microfiber towel.

Images:
- https://www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116167.jpg

Description:
Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined is an SiO2 based maintenance spray that is tailored specifically for paint protection film and vinyl. Experience enhanced hydrophobicity and chemical resistance, coupled with a simplified application process for effortless use. Instantly add slickness, self-cleaning capabilities, and hydrophobic properties to your vehicle, ensuring it remains effortlessly clean and pristine.

Suitable for matte and glossy finishes, it can be used as a standalone product or as a coating topper, providing unmatched versatility and protection.

SLICK AND REPELLENT:
Q²M PPF Maintain adds serious slickness to the surface of PPF. This slickness will aid in self cleaning and help the film reject dirt and contaminant. We want to keep the film as clean as possible, so it does not absorb contaminant over time and diminish the look of the material.

REDEFINED:
Introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we've elevated our already acclaimed chemical formulas to new heights. Through meticulous reworking and refining, we've achieved unparalleled performance, exceptional durability, and effortless usability. Our dedication remains unwavering to provide our customers with nothing short of the finest user experience.

Description:
Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined is an SiO2 based maintenance spray that is tailored specifically for paint protection film and vinyl. Experience enhanced hydrophobicity and chemical resistance, coupled with a simplified application process for effortless use. Instantly add slickness, self-cleaning capabilities, and hydrophobic properties to your vehicle, ensuring it remains effortlessly clean and pristine. Suitable for matte and glossy finishes, it can be used as a standalone product or as a coating topper, providing unmatched versatility and protection.

Q²M PPF Maintain adds serious slickness to the surface of PPF. This slickness will aid in self cleaning and help the film reject dirt and contaminant. We want to keep the film as clean as possible, so it does not absorb contaminant over time and diminish the look of the material.

PRO TIP: For best results, apply Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined on a clean, dry surface or use it as a drying aid. Simply spray the product onto a plush, high-quality microfiber towel. Work it into the paint with quick, gentle motions, then wipe away any excess with a second dry towel. Remember, a little goes a long way, so avoid overusing the product to achieve optimal results.
